terms.title: Terms & Privacy
terms.subtitle: Please read carefully before using our service.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Project Management, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the service.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.content: Project Management is a project management platform designed for small teams. We provide features to create and organize workspaces, projects and issues collaboratively.

account.title: 3. User Account
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities performed under your account. Notify us immediately in case of unauthorized use.

use.title: 4. Acceptable Use
use.content: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes. It is prohibited to use the platform for illegal activities, spam, violation of third-party rights, or any activity that harms other users.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The platform and its components are owned by Project Management. Content you create remains your property. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to host and display your content.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account in case of violation of these terms. You may close your account at any time through the platform settings.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The service is provided without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for data loss, service interruptions, or indirect damages arising from use of the platform.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms periodically. Significant changes will be communicated to users. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide when creating an account (name and email), platform usage data (workspaces, projects and issues created), and basic technical information required for the service to function.

use.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use your information to provide and improve the service, authenticate your access, store your preferences (such as the interface language), and ensure platform security.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
storage.content: Your data is stored on secure servers. We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration or destruction.

sharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. We may share information when required by law or to protect our legal rights.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights or if you have questions, contact us using the information below.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication (session token) and to store your language preferences (NEXT_LOCALE). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.content: This policy may be updated periodically. We will notify you of significant changes. We recommend reviewing this page regularly to stay informed of any updates.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us. We will respond to your request within 30 business days.

hero.heading: Manage projects with
hero.subheading: Organize workspaces, track projects and manage issues — all in one place for your team to work better.
hero.disclaimer: Free to start · No credit card required

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.description: Create separate environments for each team or client. Organize everything in one place.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Create projects inside each workspace, track status and keep progress visible.

issues.title: Issues
issues.description: Break work into trackable issues. From backlog to done, nothing gets lost.

step1.description: Sign up for free in seconds. No credit card required.

step3.title: Track your progress
step3.description: Create issues, update statuses and keep your team aligned.

finalCta.subheading: Create your account now and start managing your team in minutes.
